title: rosa reticulata var. perglandulosa
intro: Rosa reticulata var. perglandulosa, also known as the Chinese rose or rock rose, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa reticulata var. perglandulosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
